other_observers: I saw the bird with Bill Maynard, Glenn Walbek, and Mark Peterson.; Bill Maynard first saw one on 10/12, and John Drummond and other birders saw one on 10/17, both at this same location.
duration: off and on during this time
specific_location: Upper Twin Pond at Chico Basin Ranch
description: A small sparrow, flushed up from the marsh. The cream colored central crown stripe, purplish streaked nape, eliminate Nelson's Sparrow and all other sparrows. See photos.Behaviors: Secretive small sparrow in the marsh.Call: nonePlumage: juvenile molting
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
